title: Fix rand_mode value access from cast

features.name: class with rand member variable
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand-typed member variable for randomization

features.name: rand_mode method call on rand variable
features.description: Code should include calling rand_mode() as a method (function call) on a rand variable, not as property access

features.name: cast to bit type
features.description: Code should include a cast expression converting to bit type from a rand_mode() call
